displayTitle: Young Jedi Knights: Under Black Sun
synopsis: When the Galactic Empire died, they were born, a new hope for the New Republic. The young twins of Han Solo and Princess Leia have grown strong with the Force, thwarting the evil Nolaa Tarkona and destroying the Emperor's Plague. Now, with their friends Lowbacca the Wookiee and Tenel Ka, the future heroes of a legendary saga meet new dangers.
title: Young Jedi Knights: Under Black Sun
